Combining Bollinger breakout with EMA trend filter and volume confirmation creates a robust entry signal that reduces false breakouts while maintaining sensitivity to strong momentum moves. The ATR-based risk management ensures position sizing adapts to volatility, preventing over-leveraging during choppy periods.
